{{CargoClone
|name=Gvent Guru
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=106
|gene1={race} DEF +50
|gene2={race} FAME +50
|gene3=Resolver: 4.5% chance +1 Cultivation Fluid
|gene4=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +6
|gene5=Gaia Rocket Cabin, deployable robots +2
|gene6=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +10
|gene7=Gaia Rocket Cabin, deployable robots +3
|}}
